hooks.prompt: Analyze this conversation for behavioral signals. Look for: (1) corrections — user said 'no', 'wrong', redirected you; (2) preferences — 'I prefer', 'always', 'don't'; (3) frustration — 'never mind', 'forget it', very short replies after long ones; (4) praise — 'perfect', 'exactly', 'great'; (5) tone mismatch — you were verbose when user was terse, or vice versa. Return JSON: {"signals": [{"type": "correction|preference|frustration|praise|tone", "detail": "brief description"}]} or {"signals": []} if nothing notable. Be selective — only flag clear signals, not ambiguous ones.
